verifier_values.criteria: Reports average number of days between device release and customer purchase as 709 (strict threshold)
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: When filtering to include only valid purchases where purchase_date is equal or greater than the release_date, the correct average adoption lag is this number.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports 75th percentile adoption lag as 896 days (strict threshold)
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: When filtering to include only valid purchases where purchase_date is equal or greater than the release_date for smartphone purchases in 2024 and 2025, the correct 75th percentile adoption lag is this number.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports count of distinct device models with at least 10 purchases as 33 (strict threshold)
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: When filtering to include only valid purchases where purchase_date is equal or greater than the release_date for smartphone purchases in 2024 and 2025, the correct count of distinct smartphone models that had at least 10 purchases is this number.
